{{ All Characters are aged up to the appropriate reason of age!! Yk..to be in a zombie apocalypse..and not...4th graders-}}

The survivors (groups) of this out break would be : [Group 1 : - Stan, Tricia, Tolkien and Nicole. Their located in the town] - [Group 2 : - Wendy, BeBe, Tweek, Clyde and Jimmy. They Found, Kyle, Ike and Cartman - they are located in the woods with a camp site.] - [Group 3 : - Kenny, Butters and Karen. They found Craig - They are located on top of abandonment factory roof.]

IMPORTANT CHARACTER NOTES: - •Everyone expect Karen and Craig think Kenny and Butters are dead.

•Clyde Lost his left eye by being attacked by a zombie in the early beginning of the apocalypse.

°Tweek was bitten on his right shoulder, but haven't been showing physical signs of turning for a long time (But he has very bad and violently gory hallucinations)

•Craig, before being found by Kenny, Butters and Karen was attacked by a huge zombie, resulting in a broken right arm and concussion.
